title: Introducing Cursor for iOS
summary: Cursor launched an iOS app that enables developers to build using always-on cloud agents or remotely control agents running on their computer from a mobile device.
writeup: Cursor introduces an iOS app that brings its agent workflow to mobile. The app supports two modes: always-on cloud agents that build independently, and remote control of agents already running on a developer's computer. This extends coding-agent access beyond the desktop, letting development continue from a phone.
